title: Set up project structure and configuration
description: Create the base Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind, and required dependencies

title: Create core TypeScript types and in-memory data store
description: Define all entity types and implement the singleton in-memory store with seeded demo data

title: Implement authentication utilities and API routes
description: Create auth helper functions and API routes for login, logout, and session management

title: Build UI components library
description: Create reusable UI components: Avatar, Badge, Button, Modal, and NotificationPanel

title: Create layout components
description: Build Navbar and Sidebar components for consistent layout across pages

title: Implement login page and home page
description: Create the login page and main landing page with authentication flow

title: Build project management API routes
description: Implement CRUD operations for projects and project members

title: Create dashboard page and components
description: Build the main dashboard with project listing and creation functionality

title: Implement board and column API routes
description: Create API endpoints for board operations and column management

title: Build task management API routes
description: Implement CRUD operations for tasks, task movement, and comments

title: Create notifications API route
description: Implement notifications retrieval and marking as read functionality

title: Build drag-and-drop hook
description: Create custom useDragAndDrop hook for native HTML5 drag events

title: Create board components
description: Build Kanban board, column, and task card components

title: Build board modal components
description: Create modals for adding tasks, viewing task details, and adding columns

title: Implement board page with real-time updates
description: Create the main board page with polling for real-time collaboration simulation
